channel.title: Forms on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Forms on Aamu.app blog

item.title: Database automations with Aamu.app
item.description: How Aamu.app database automations turn newly inserted rows and form responses into emails and follow-up tasks.

item.title: Creating survey forms with Aamu.app Form Builder
item.description: How to create survey forms with Aamu.app Form Builder and store responses in a connected database for follow-up and reporting.

item.title: Creating a contact form with Aamu.app
item.description: Using the Aamu.app database for contact forms
